description_long: This is a rectangular, clear glass bottle with a black label and a square black-and-white cap. The front label displays the iconic Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 Tennessee Whiskey branding in ornate white script on a black background, surrounded by decorative borders. The sides of the bottle feature additional text and branding, including product information and legal details, all in white on black. The bottle has a broad, flat base and gently sloping shoulders leading to a short neck topped with a square cap. The glass appears thick and sturdy, with the label wrapping around most of the bottle's body. The overall design is classic and easily recognizable, often associated with whiskey and spirits.
description: A rectangular glass bottle with a black label and square cap, featuring Jack Daniel's Tennessee Whiskey branding in white script. The bottle is sturdy, with ornate labeling and a classic whiskey bottle shape.
description_view_0: The back of the bottle, showing a dense block of white text on a black label.
description_view_1: A side view with vertical and circular white text elements on the black label, including 'MADE IN TENNESSEE'.
description_view_2: The front view, prominently displaying the Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 Tennessee Whiskey branding in ornate white script.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, showing additional product and legal information in white text on a black label.
attribute_label_or_branding: The bottle features a prominent black label with ornate white Jack Daniel's Old No. 7 Tennessee Whiskey branding on the front, additional white text on the sides and back, and decorative borders. The label is highly detailed and covers most of the bottle's body.
